title: CT4 automation-first Lean tactic
description: The complete compiled graph, general capability API, specialized capability profiles, node automation contracts, and semantic residual inventory for this tactic.

transitions.constructorType:
{P : Core.Problem} →
  {S : CT4.Spec P} →
    {capability : CT4.Capability S} →
      {input : CT4.Input P} → CT4.Graph.Edge S capability input CT4.Graph.NodeId.entry CT4.Graph.NodeId.assignment

{P : Core.Problem} →
  {S : CT4.Spec P} →
    {capability : CT4.Capability S} →
      {input : CT4.Input P} →
        CT4.AssignmentState S capability input →
          CT4.Graph.Edge S capability input CT4.Graph.NodeId.assignment CT4.Graph.NodeId.availability

{P : Core.Problem} →
  {S : CT4.Spec P} →
    {capability : CT4.Capability S} →
      {input : CT4.Input P} →
        CT4.MissingPayerResidual S input →
          CT4.Graph.Edge S capability input CT4.Graph.NodeId.availability CT4.Graph.NodeId.missingTerminal

{P : Core.Problem} →
  {S : CT4.Spec P} →
    {capability : CT4.Capability S} →
      {input : CT4.Input P} →
        CT4.TotalAssignmentState S capability input →
          CT4.Graph.Edge S capability input CT4.Graph.NodeId.availability CT4.Graph.NodeId.fibres

{P : Core.Problem} →
  {S : CT4.Spec P} →
    {capability : CT4.Capability S} →
      {input : CT4.Input P} →
        CT4.OverloadedFibreResidual S capability input →
          CT4.Graph.Edge S capability input CT4.Graph.NodeId.fibres CT4.Graph.NodeId.overloadTerminal

{P : Core.Problem} →
  {S : CT4.Spec P} →
    {capability : CT4.Capability S} →
      {input : CT4.Input P} →
        CT4.BoundedFibreState S capability input →
          CT4.Graph.Edge S capability input CT4.Graph.NodeId.fibres CT4.Graph.NodeId.comparison

{P : Core.Problem} →
  {S : CT4.Spec P} →
    {capability : CT4.Capability S} →
      {input : CT4.Input P} →
        CT4.C4Certificate S capability input →
          CT4.Graph.Edge S capability input CT4.Graph.NodeId.comparison CT4.Graph.NodeId.c4Terminal

{P : Core.Problem} →
  {S : CT4.Spec P} →
    {capability : CT4.Capability S} →
      {input : CT4.Input P} →
        CT4.CapacityResidual S capability input →
          CT4.Graph.Edge S capability input CT4.Graph.NodeId.comparison CT4.Graph.NodeId.capacityTerminal

semanticFields.leanType: CT4.Overloaded S capability input total.assignment payer
capability.required input ≤ CT4.totalCapacity S capability input

apiDeclarations.type: Type
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT4.Graph.NodeId

apiDeclarations.type: CT4.Graph.NodeId → String
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT4.Graph.NodeId.code

apiDeclarations.type:
{P : Core.Problem} →
  (S : CT4.Spec P) → CT4.Capability S → CT4.Input P → CT4.Graph.NodeId → CT4.Graph.NodeId → Type (max u_3 u_4)
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT4.Graph.Edge

apiDeclarations.type: Type
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT4.Graph.Terminal

apiDeclarations.type: CT4.Graph.Terminal → CT4.Graph.NodeId
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT4.Graph.Terminal.nodeId

apiDeclarations.type:
{P : Core.Problem} →
  (S : CT4.Spec P) → CT4.Capability S → CT4.Input P → CT4.Graph.NodeId → CT4.Graph.NodeId → Type (max u_3 u_4)
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT4.Graph.Path

apiDeclarations.type: {P : Core.Problem} → (S : CT4.Spec P) → CT4.Capability S → CT4.Input P → List CT4.Graph.NodeId → Prop
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT4.Graph.ValidTrace

apiDeclarations.type: {P : Core.Problem} → CT4.Spec P → Type (max (max (max u_1 u_2) u_3) u_4)
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT4.Capability

apiDeclarations.type: Core.Problem → Type (max u_1 u_2)
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT4.Input

apiDeclarations.type: {P : Core.Problem} → (S : CT4.Spec P) → CT4.Capability S → CT4.Input P → Type (max u_3 u_4)
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT4.ExecutionResult

apiDeclarations.type: {P : Core.Problem} → (S : CT4.Spec P) → CT4.Capability S → CT4.Input P → CT4.Graph.Terminal → Type (max u_3 u_4)
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT4.RawOutcome

apiDeclarations.type:
{P : Core.Problem} →
  (S : CT4.Spec P) → (capability : CT4.Capability S) → (input : CT4.Input P) → CT4.ExecutionResult S capability input
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT4.run

apiDeclarations.type:
{P : Core.Problem} →
  (S : CT4.Spec P) → (capability : CT4.Capability S) → (input : CT4.Input P) → CT4.ExecutionResult S capability input
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT4.runReference

apiDeclarations.type:
∀ {P : Core.Problem} (S : CT4.Spec P) (capability : CT4.Capability S) (input : CT4.Input P),
  CT4.RawOutcome.Valid S capability input (CT4.run S capability input).outcome
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT4.run_verified

apiDeclarations.type:
∀ {P : Core.Problem} (S : CT4.Spec P) (capability : CT4.Capability S) (input : CT4.Input P),
  CT4.Graph.ValidTrace S capability input (CT4.ExecutionResult.trace S capability input (CT4.run S capability input))
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT4.run_trace_valid

apiDeclarations.type:
∀ {P : Core.Problem} (S : CT4.Spec P) (capability : CT4.Capability S) (input : CT4.Input P),
  ∃ result,
    CT4.RawOutcome.Valid S capability input result.outcome ∧
      CT4.Graph.ValidTrace S capability input (CT4.ExecutionResult.trace S capability input result)
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT4.run_total

apiDeclarations.type:
∀ {P : Core.Problem} (S : CT4.Spec P) (capability : CT4.Capability S) (input : CT4.Input P)
  (left right : CT4.ExecutionResult S capability input),
  left = CT4.run S capability input → right = CT4.run S capability input → left = right
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT4.run_deterministic

apiDeclarations.type:
∀ {P : Core.Problem} (S : CT4.Spec P) (capability : CT4.Capability S) (input : CT4.Input P)
  (result : CT4.ExecutionResult S capability input),
  result.terminal = CT4.Graph.Terminal.missing ∨
    result.terminal = CT4.Graph.Terminal.overload ∨
      result.terminal = CT4.Graph.Terminal.c4 ∨ result.terminal = CT4.Graph.Terminal.capacity
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT4.outcome_exhaustive

apiDeclarations.type: Core.CapabilityContract
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT4.capabilityContract

apiDeclarations.type: List Core.NodeAutomationContract
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT4.nodeAutomationContracts

apiDeclarations.type: List Core.ResidualKindContract
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT4.residualKindContracts
